outlook.volatilityExpectation: Elevated in short-term due to negative 0DTE GEX; stabilization expected from positive Weekly/Monthly GEX.
outlook.summary: Market is pinned at the Weekly Gamma Flip (593.01). 590 serves as massive structural support across all expiries (RESONANCE). Negative 0DTE GEX suggests volatile intraday trading, but positive broader GEX suppresses large macro moves. Bias is towards support defense at 590 targeting Max Pain at 595/600.

levels.motivazione: Massive Put OI convergence: 80k (0DTE), 25k (Weekly), 33k (Monthly). Primary structural floor.
Weekly Gamma Flip aligns exactly with Spot. Critical inflection point for directional momentum.
Dominant Call OI in 0DTE (54k) and Weekly Max Pain. Acts as magnet and resistance.
0DTE Max Pain level. Strong magnetic attraction for market makers into expiration.
